# Slush Wallet
> Slush Wallet Integration

- [Slush Wallet Integration](..md): Integrate Slush Wallet into your Sui application for mobile and web wallet support.
- [App Integration](./dapp.md): Connect your app to Slush Wallet using the Slush Wallet SDK and wallet standard.
- [Deep Linking](./deep-linking.md): Configure deep links to open Slush Wallet directly to specific screens or actions.
